----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Category               ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors         STRING_OFFSET_TOO_LARGE
Except.                CX_SY_RANGE_OUT_OF_BOUNDS
ABAP: Program          SAPLSUSR_CERTRULE
Application Component  BC-SEC-LGN
Date and Time          28.03.2026 20:19:14 (UTC)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Short Text                                                                                        |
|    Invalid access to a string (offset too large)                                                 |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|What happened?                                                                                    |
|    Error in the ABAP application program.                                                        |
|                                                                                                  |
|    The current ABAP program "SAPLSUSR_CERTRULE" had to be terminated because it                  |
|     found a                                                                                      |
|    statement that could not be executed.                                                         |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|Error analysis                                                                                    |
|    An exception has occurred in class "CX_SY_RANGE_OUT_OF_BOUNDS". This exception                |
|     was not caught                                                                               |
|    in procedure "PARSE_ENTRY" "(FORM)" or propagated by a RAISING clause.                        |
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
